title: Daventry International Rail Freight Terminal IV project: Section 35 Direction, Planning Act 2008
body: "Date of decision: 17 December 2025  Company and project location  Prologis UK Limited. Land to the east of M1 Junction 18, West Northamptonshire  Type of project and consent requested  Business and Commercial Development Project; a logistics hub and ancillary office accommodation as well as: innovation centre; a lorry park and an amenity hub.  Direction under Section 35 of the Planning Act 2008 responding to a request that the above project be development requiring a Development Consent Order under the Planning Act 2008 regime. "
